name: google-maps-to-excel-claude
description: Extract professional contact lists from Google Maps and export to Excel — with Claude Code
author: rouchsamuel-lgtm

skills.name: Google Maps → Excel
skills.description: Extracts professional contact lists from Google Maps (name, address, phone, website) and exports to Excel. Triggers on: 'scrape Google Maps', 'liste de [catégorie] à [ville]', 'extrais depuis Google Maps', 'donne-moi les contacts de [métier] à [lieu]'.
